type_1.name: Mountain
type_1.description: The air is thin and cold here.

type_2.name: Peak
type_2.description: Snow clings to the jagged rock.

type_4.name: Peak
type_4.description: The wind howls violently at this altitude.

type_5.name: Plains
type_5.description: Travelers rest here for the night.

type_6.name: Plains
type_6.description: A small campfire smolders in the center.

type_7.name: Forest
type_7.description: The air smells of pine and damp earth.

type_8.name: Forest
type_8.description: Tall trees block out most of the light.
